# Visual QA — 2026-05-05

**Status:** 50 screenshots captured (25 URLs × desktop + mobile). Findings doc not generated by the dispatched agent — it completed the screenshot pass but the harness blocked the file write at the end. Reviewing the screenshots is now a manual pass.

## Screenshots

All 50 PNGs are in this directory. Naming convention:
- `desktop-<slug>.png` — 1440×900 viewport
- `mobile-<slug>.png` — 375×812 viewport (iPhone 14)

URLs covered (25):
- `/` (home)
- `/deals`
- `/destinations`
- `/brands`
- `/will-it-hold-up`
- `/reality-index`
- `/forfeit` ← new lander, verify it ticks live
- `/pitch-diaries` ← new lander
- `/scout` ← new lander
- `/pitch-diaries/submit` ← form
- `/orlando`, `/las-vegas`, `/gatlinburg`, `/branson`, `/myrtle-beach`
- `/westgate`, `/hgv`, `/wyndham`, `/marriott`
- `/deals-under-100`, `/3-night-packages`
- `/resort-roulette`, `/vacpack-games`
- `/blog`, `/about`

## What to look for during review

For each pair of screenshots:
1. Mobile layout — does anything overflow horizontally? Are forms unusable?
2. Desktop layout — does anything look broken at a wider viewport?
3. Are images loading? Are there blank rectangles?
4. Is the new Tools dropdown showing the three new entries (Forfeit Clock, Pitch Diaries, Scout Network)?
5. Is the Forfeit ticker animating live?
6. Does the navbar look the same on mobile and desktop?

## Pages most worth a careful look

- `forfeit` — first time render, brand-new component
- `pitch-diaries` and `pitch-diaries/submit` — first time render of the form
- `scout` — first time render
- `home` — anchor of the user experience
- `westgate` — biggest brand, most-trafficked

## Next steps

If anything in the screenshots looks broken, flag it and we can iterate. The screenshots will live in this directory until the next overnight pass overwrites them.
